message:
fix(sync,gen_server,websocket,plan,transport): FIFO-fair mutex, flush-on-close, drain fix, aggregator flush

src/sync/mutex.rs:
- Add FIFO fairness to try_lock(): when older waiters are queued, try_lock
  returns Locked instead of barging ahead, preventing starvation
- Add MutexState::is_head_waiter() and can_acquire() helpers that check
  both lock state and waiter queue position
- Update lock() to use can_acquire() for consistent fairness logic
- Add comprehensive tests: try_lock_respects_fifo_fairness, fairness with
  multiple concurrent waiters, barge prevention under contention
- Update TryLockError::Locked message to mention queued waiters

src/gen_server.rs:
- Remove artificial drain_limit cap on mailbox shutdown drain loop — the
  old limit could leave unprocessed Call envelopes with pending reply
  channels, causing silent drops. The mailbox is bounded and closed before
  draining, so exhausting it is always finite.

src/net/websocket/client.rs + src/net/websocket/split.rs:
- Flush the underlying I/O stream after sending the WebSocket close frame
  to ensure the close frame is actually transmitted before the TCP
  connection drops, preventing silent close-frame loss on fast shutdown

src/plan/analysis.rs:
- Fix Race combinator parallelism calculation: use saturating_add instead
  of max, since a race of N branches runs all N concurrently, not just
  the most-parallel single branch
- Fix branch parallelism fold: use saturating_add + max(1) instead of
  Iterator::max().unwrap_or(1), matching the corrected semantics

src/transport/aggregator.rs:
- Fix buffer-full handling: when the reorder buffer reaches capacity,
  flush all buffered symbols in sequence order before inserting the new
  one, instead of dropping the new symbol and hoping for retransmission
- This prevents data loss on bursty out-of-order delivery bursts
- Rename test to aggregator_buffer_full_forces_flush and update
  assertions/comments to match the new flush-on-full semantics

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
